name: Jullundur Motor Agency (Delhi) Limited
summary: Jullundur Motor Agency (Delhi) Limited trades and distributes automobile parts, accessories, and petroleum products primarily in India. The company offers automotive components; fly wheel rings; gaskets and radiators; thin wall engine bearings, bushings, and thrust washers; hydraulic brake parts, fluids, and coolants; fan belts; suspension, drive shafts, and filters; automotive air springs; engine oil and grease; window balancers; water pump assy products; rear axles shafts; and air, oil, and fuel filters. It also provides head and tail lightings; clutch plates; cover assy products; silencers; brake linings, disc pads, and clutch facings; engine valves, guides, and tappets; steering linkages and steering assy products; power steering assy products and pumps; crank shafts; bearings taper rollers; engine mountings and rubber parts; various types of fasteners and sockets; UJ kits and crown wheel pinions; automotive bearings; air brake equipment and spares; and other related products. The company was founded in 1927 and is based in New Delhi, India.
